recommendations.title: Meet Bill
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered bank executive mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.

recommendations.title: Madea's Witness Protection
recommendations.overview: For years, mild-mannered Wall Street banker George Needleman has meandered through life oblivious to his family's dysfunction and his company's malfeasance, but he's forced to wake up when he learns that he's been framed in a mob-backed Ponzi scheme.

recommendations.title: Saw: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: This animated comic goes back in time to explore the events that spurred the transformation of mild-mannered John Kramer into the monstrous Jigsaw.

recommendations.title: Birthday Girl
recommendations.overview: John is a mild-mannered banker who has never been lucky in love. Fed up with waiting for the right girl to come along, John takes a chance on a Russian mail-order bride arranged via the Internet, where he is introduced to Nadia. John's fondness for N

recommendations.title: Hit Man
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered professor moonlighting as a fake hit man in police stings ignites a chain reaction of trouble when he falls for a potential client.

recommendations.title: The In-Laws
recommendations.overview: Right before his daughter's wedding, a mild-mannered foot doctor discovers that his new in-laws are international smugglers.

recommendations.title: Norbit
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered guy who is engaged to a monstrous woman meets the woman of his dreams, and schemes to find a way to be with her.

recommendations.title: The ComDads
recommendations.overview: Unable to find her runaway son, a woman deceives two of her ex-lovers from her youth, a mild-mannered teacher and a tough journalist, that each is the real father in order to obtain their help.

recommendations.title: Enemy
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered college professor discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

recommendations.title: Seven Years of Marriage
recommendations.overview: After seven years of marriage, a couple of professional workers (he, a doctor and she, a banker) try to refresh their sex life.
